market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected if spot breaks below 655 support. 0DTE positive GEX provides short-term stability, but weekly/monthly negative GEX amplifies downside risk. Smirk skew confirms hedging pressure.
outlook.summary: Spot (657.81) sits between critical 655 Max Pain magnet and 660.6 Gamma Flip resistance. Extreme Put/Call ratios (4.01 monthly) and negative structural GEX (-3.67B monthly) indicate heavy downside hedging. Dealers long 0DTE gamma will suppress intraday moves, but breakdown below 655 targets 650-640 support cluster. Upside capped at 665-670 Call Walls.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Gamma Flip (660.6) aligns with significant Call OI across all expiries. High volume (165K) indicates active dealer hedging. Primary resistance capping upside.
Highest 0DTE Call OI (12,975) with elevated volume (40,166). Secondary resistance above gamma flip. Dealers sell deltas here.
Weekly Max Pain with massive 0DTE Put volume (179,850). Spot-adjacent magnet level. High activity indicates pinning potential.
0DTE Max Pain with substantial Put OI (26,693). Downside target if 655 support fails. Confluence with monthly Put accumulation.
Triple expiry resonance: 36K (0DTE), 85K (Weekly), 98K (Monthly) Put OI. Structural support with dealer gamma support.
Dominant Put Wall: 30K (0DTE), 107K (Weekly), 126K (Monthly) Put OI. Maximum structural support. Extreme PCR confirms.
Significant Call OI across all expiries: 12K (0DTE), 10K (Weekly), 21K (Monthly). Upper resistance ceiling.
Highest monthly Call OI (34,559). Major structural resistance for April expiry. Upside target cap.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility from positive GEX (0.68B), but smirk skew (1.50) and high PCR (1.78) indicate downside pressure. Expect range-bound with downward drift toward max pain.
outlook.summary: Spot hovering just above 0DTE gamma flip (586.48) in a dealer long-gamma environment. Heavy put concentration at 570/580 creates structural support. Call walls at 590/600 cap upside. Max pain at 581 acts as magnetic pull. High PCR suggests bearish positioning but positive GEX suppresses volatility.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Highest combined put OI across all expirations (66,839 total). 0DTE: 17,231 | WEEKLY: 9,158 | MONTHLY: 40,450. Major institutional support zone.
RESONANCE: Key resistance across all expirations. 0DTE: 11,114 | WEEKLY: 6,196 | MONTHLY: 21,189. Only 0.44% above spot - immediate ceiling.
0DTE gamma flip - spot at 587.43 is just 0.16% above. Critical equilibrium point where dealer hedging behavior shifts. High probability of directional movement if breached.
CONFLUENCE: Major structural resistance in WEEKLY (6,758) + MONTHLY (38,155 CALL + 36,455 PUT). High put interest indicates pinning potential.
Significant put OI: 0DTE (15,980) + WEEKLY (7,231) + MONTHLY (32,723). Total 55,934 OI. Key support zone aligning with smirk skew bearish sentiment.
0DTE max pain level - price magnet where option value is minimized. Only 1.1% below spot. MM hedging creates attraction toward this level.
EXTREME VOLUME: 0DTE put volume 115,261 (highest in dataset). High OI: 6,547 CALL + 4,414 PUT. Intense dealer hedging activity creates congestion.
Significant call OI across expirations: 0DTE (8,932) + WEEKLY (9,558) + MONTHLY (7,865). Secondary resistance above 590.
